title: LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: FLORENCE SELF-SUFFICIENCY AND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Energy assistance program for households with seniors that heat with electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood pellets or wood through a limited federal government funding program. The Low Income Home Energy Program (LIHEAP) makes a one-time payment directly to the utility account. 3180 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Household with a member over 60 years old and 60% of median income level Hours: Call for hours (541) 682-7835 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 997-8251 Main phone LIHEAP Recording (541) 682-7835 Florence callers only (541) 902-9430 ext 7835 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: City of Florence SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Gas Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SUMMER EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE FOR NEEDY FAMILIES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FLORENCE SELF-SUFFICIENCY AND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION
